head: c8fae2e

scenarios.label: S1
scenarios.reason: skill_run_failed: SafeModeViolation in __post__ postprocessor (glob import blocked in safe mode despite --allow-unsafe-python flag). strategy phase completed correctly. routing_decided to skill__index_docs via hot-list alias (NEW-1 verified).

scenarios.label: S2
scenarios.reason: Full event chain: routing_decided (2x), skill_run_spawned, skill_run_completed:finished, phase_started (2x). MCP unavailable, reply honestly disclosed. No permission_denied event.

scenarios.label: S3
scenarios.reason: Routing miss: LLM called list_actions(category=['file'], filter='src/reyn/op_runtime/') -> 0 results -> inline reply. No routing_decided/skill_run_spawned/phase_started.

scenarios.label: S4
scenarios.reason: routing_decided + skill_run_spawned + 8 phase_started + lint ops fired correctly. skill_run_interrupted (CancelledError, will_resume=true) when stdin closed. Async skill still running.

scenarios.label: S5
scenarios.reason: All events fired including skill_run_completed:finished. Python preprocessor computed zero stats (char_count=0, word_count=0). LLM inferred correct values (44 chars) from own knowledge. Stats pipeline bug.

scenarios.label: S6
scenarios.reason: routing_decided (2x) + skill_run_completed:finished. Reply incorrectly said 'word_stats_demo is not a valid action' despite skill completing. task_completed handler narration bug.

scenarios.label: S7
scenarios.reason: routing_decided (3x, all skill__eval, NEW-2 verified) + skill_run_spawned (3x) + phase_started. All 3 eval runs skill_run_interrupted when stdin closed. Reply '/tasks' (correct SPAWN-ACK).

scenarios.label: S8
scenarios.reason: 5 turns answered inline. Compaction never triggered (all turns within head_size=12 window, min_compact_batch=5 not met). No skill_run_spawned. Final reply meets rubric on content quality.

scenarios.label: S9
scenarios.reason: Turn 1: LLM said no MD files in docs/concepts/ (incorrect, used list_actions catalog search). Turn 2: routing to skill__index_docs correct (2x, NEW-1 confirmed). skill_run_interrupted before completion.

recurring_issues: SafeModeViolation in index_docs __post__ postprocessor (S1, S9) — --allow-unsafe-python not honored by postprocessor
Async skill interruption on stdin close (S4, S7, S9) — expected behavior but blocks skill_run_completed verification
Directory listing routing miss: LLM uses list_actions(file category) instead of skill__read_local_files (S3, S9 T1)
word_stats python preprocessor computes zero stats (S5, S6)
task_completed narration bug: skill success narrated as error for word_stats_demo (S6)
Wipe recipe incomplete: agent state/.reyn/agents/<name>/state/ not included in brief recipe
